commands.repair_reason: Needs contributor-supplied real behavior proof before merge; there is no discrete code defect for an automated repair lane to fix.; Cleared: The diff is limited to Telegram probe transport handling, a focused test, and CHANGELOG; it does not change dependencies, workflows, secrets, package execution, or downloaded artifacts. (sha=efb4323ce6b6d30101cf1209e2d95d0bb94e6533)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Telegram getMe probing to cache the full Telegram transport, call `forceFallback()` after probe fetch errors, add a regression test, and add a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main can be exercised by making the first getMe `fetchWithTimeout` abort with a `TimeoutError`, which the probe retry loop does not promote to the transport fallback. I did not run a live IPv4-only Telegram host reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor-supplied real behavior proof before merge; there is no discrete code defect for an automated repair lane to fix.
